issues.title: NEW: Smoke Claude `Install Playwright CLI skills` step times out at 10min downloading FFmpeg from blocked azureedge.net domains
issues.detail: Run 26537099387 (Smoke Claude, 13.7m duration, conclusion=failure). Step `Install Playwright CLI skills` ran `playwright-cli install --skills` which downloads FFmpeg from `cdn.playwright.dev`. The download then redirects/CDN-resolves through `playwright-akamai.azureedge.net:443`, `playwright-verizon.azureedge.net:443`, and `playwright.azureedge.net:443` — all 3 are NOT in GH_AW_ALLOWED_DOMAINS and were firewall-blocked. After 10min the GitHub Actions step timed out. The allowlist already contains `cdn.playwright.dev` and `playwright.download.prss.microsoft.com` but is missing the actual binary-blob host. Two fixes: (a) add `*.azureedge.net` (or the 3 specific playwright-*.azureedge.net hosts) to allowed_domains for Smoke Claude; (b) pre-cache the FFmpeg binary in the runner image so the step doesn't need network access.

issues.title: Copilot agents still emit add_comment with target="*" but no item_number (RECURRED, down from 15 to 2)
issues.detail: Contribution Check (run 26539586973, copilot+claude-sonnet-4.6) emitted 2 add_comment payloads with target="*" and no item_number. Workflow conclusion: failure. DOWN from 15 yesterday so the prompt fix from yesterday's recommendation partially landed but didn't fully eliminate the pattern. Yesterday's two-pronged fix still relevant: (1) tighten the workflow prompt to require explicit item_number when target=*; (2) tighten safe-output schema validation at MCP boundary.

issues.title: Changeset Generator still on gpt-5.3-codex → 404 (recommendation unactioned 2 days running)
issues.detail: Run 26537099239 — Changeset Generator codex CLI sent `gpt-5-codex-alpha-2025-11-07` to proxy → 404 Model not found. Aw_info.json model field still reads `gpt-5.3-codex`. All 5 retries failed. This is the EXACT failure noted yesterday with the EXACT recommended fix (set model: gpt-5.4 in workflow frontmatter) still unactioned. Other codex workflows (AI Moderator, Smoke Codex) succeeded on gpt-5.4 today, confirming the fix path works.

issues.title: Smoke Pi blocks 20 of 22 requests (91% block rate, observability hotspot)
issues.detail: Observability surfaced Smoke Pi as `network friction hotspot` with 91% firewall block rate. Blocked endpoints: `api-proxy:10002` (12), `api-proxy:10000` (8) — these are internal sandbox API-proxy endpoints. The smoke test executed but most internal-proxy traffic was rejected. Either the proxy hostnames changed or the firewall config for Smoke Pi is stale. Workflow itself still succeeded so this may be expected behavior of the smoke test, but worth verifying.

issues.title: Daily firewall block rate JUMPED to 24.9% (was 16.4% yesterday) driven by Playwright + Smoke Pi internal-proxy blocks
issues.detail: 1682 total requests, 419 blocked (24.9%). Up significantly from 16.4% yesterday. Drivers: (1) Playwright Azure edge nodes blocked in Smoke Claude (3 endpoints) — root cause of the Smoke Claude timeout; (2) Smoke Pi internal api-proxy blocks (20 reqs); (3) `(unknown)` DNS-failure blocks still dominate at 299. Excluding Smoke Pi and Smoke Claude, block rate is more typical.

issues.title: RESOLVED: yesterday's Execute Claude Code CLI step-timeout did not recur
issues.detail: Across 9 claude runs today (incl Smoke Claude, Daily Caveman Optimizer, Design Decision Gate, Lockfile Stats, Team Evolution, Failure Investigator, Daily Safe Output Tool Optimizer), none hit the `Execute Claude Code CLI` 10-min timeout. Today's Smoke Claude failure is a DIFFERENT step (Install Playwright CLI skills) — that timeout has its own issue entry. Yesterday's recommendation to bump timeout-minutes may have landed; or the wrapper-drain bug was transient.

issues.title: RESOLVED for this audit cycle: 0 occurrences in 22 copilot runs today
issues.detail: awf-squid container ran healthy across all PR Sous Chef and Smoke Copilot runs today. The recurrence pattern is intermittent (1-2/day historically); keep watching but no action needed.

issues.detail: Run 26537099471 (Smoke Copilot, 12.8m, success). The staging-dir-empty issue from yesterday did not recur. Either the prompt fix landed or yesterday was a one-off agent behavior. Close as resolved.
